title: Collapsible
description: An interactive component that expands and collapses content.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install the required dependencies for the collapsible component.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

examples.title: Default
Order Panel
examples.description: A collapsible panel styled like an order summary with independent rows.
examples.code:
import { Collapsible, CollapsibleContent, CollapsibleTrigger } from "@repo/components"; import { ChevronsUpDown } from "lucide-react"; import React, { useState } from "react"; export default function CollapsibleOrder() { const [open, setOpen] = useState(false); return (

Order #4189

Status Shipped
Shipping address 100 Market St, San Francisco
Items 2x Studio Headphones
); }

examples.title: Product Details
examples.description: A single card that seamlessly expands to reveal additional content and actions.

examples.title: File Explorer
examples.description: Nested collapsible components acting as a complex file tree sidebar.
